name_cn:
Genuine quality
5BC125: New MiuMiu MiuWander Sheepskin Bag, soft and fluffy teddy bear fur is just too cute, an essential item for autumn and winter, retro matte hardware, utilizing curved lines to retain a playful feel, the bag shape is structured and stylish, full of personality, sweet and chic, spacious, Dimensions: 23X13X7, comes with original packaging
